meta.delta: 0.0 flat. Two nice new features added (ShortcutToast, solo spotlight messages) but zero bugs fixed from the 19 open issues carried from review 61. Bug backlog growing faster than it shrinks.
still_broken: overflow:visible bleed on office-floor (Office.css line 84) — desktop screenshot confirms coffee station, SUNRISE artwork, cactus, and ambient particle orb all visibly outside the teal border. Tenth review this has appeared.
Triple visibilitychange listeners (App.jsx lines 859, 881, 1100) — three separate addEventListener calls still present, firing redundant state updates on every tab switch.
completionToast 16-property inline style block (App.jsx lines 1149-1166) — all 16 properties still hardcoded inline; only border and boxShadow are dynamic.
Duplicate dead CSS selectors with single quotes (Office.css lines 91-95) — single-quote vibe selectors still precede double-quote duplicates with extra --grid-line vars.
Tab panel ARIA broken — conditional ternary render means only one tabpanel exists in DOM; inactive aria-controls points to nonexistent node (App.jsx line 1258).
polling-paused-pill is a span with onClick (App.jsx line 1196) — no role, no tabIndex, no keyboard handler.
window.matchMedia called inline during JSX render (App.jsx line 1201) — layout query on every render, SSR-unsafe.
No H2 headings anywhere — Active Workers and Activity Log section titles use div.section-title (lines 1267, 1333).
sparkleUnseen useState has no setter (App.jsx line 721) — localStorage written on click but state never updated; twinkle persists all session.
Activity log filter logic computed twice per render — identical filter chains in IIFE count label (lines 1335-1350) and ActivityLog entries prop (lines 1394-1403). Neither memoized.
stat-dispatch active span has cursor:pointer and onClick but no tabIndex or role=button (App.jsx lines 477-482) — keyboard inaccessible.

getRelativeTime duplicated in Office.jsx — ghost bubble IIFE (lines 748-757) and whiteboard huddle IIFE (line 969) are ad-hoc reimplementations of App.jsx canonical version at line 55. Implementations have already drifted.
tab-error-badge span has no aria-label (App.jsx line 1254) — screen reader reads bare number with no context.
Array.from with length 12 for ambient particles runs on every render (App.jsx line 1124) — stable array should be module-level constant.
Mobile speech bubble overlaps Office tab toggle — confirmed in mobile screenshot at 375px.
handleTabKeyDown not wrapped in useCallback (App.jsx line 760) — plain arrow function recreated every render, passed to two memoized tab buttons.
StatsBar computes workers.filter three separate times for active/idle/errorCount (lines 447-449) — single reduce pass would suffice.
Third inline relative-time IIFE in Office.jsx whiteboard huddle label (line 969) — codebase has three separate implementations.
Spread Array(7) allocation in Office.jsx ambient-particles (line 1654) — same render-time waste as App.jsx Array.from.
new_issues: footer-tagline span has onClick+cursor:pointer but no tabIndex, role=button, or onKeyDown (App.jsx line 1414) — the quote rotator is completely keyboard inaccessible. Third location with this exact bug pattern after polling-paused-pill and stat-dispatch.

stat-card sync-status div has onClick when pollingPaused but no role, tabIndex, or onKeyDown (App.jsx line 491) — the Stuck card directly below it at line 506 correctly has role=button + tabIndex + onKeyDown; sync-status was missed. Inconsistent accessibility.

SOLO_SPOTLIGHT_MESSAGES lookup is an IIFE in JSX (App.jsx line 1292) — multi-step inline IIFE with optional chaining, toLowerCase, and two fallback levels computed on every render. Extract to getSoloMessage helper or useMemo.

suggestions.title: Fix overflow:visible bleed on .office-floor — review #10
suggestions.description: Office.css line 84: overflow:visible causes coffee station, SUNRISE artwork, cactus, and ambient particle orb to render outside the teal border — confirmed in desktop screenshot. Change to overflow:hidden. Elements needing to escape (speech bubbles, tooltips, hover cards) should use position:fixed or a React portal. This has been open for ten consecutive reviews.

suggestions.title: Fix broken tab panel ARIA — inactive panel absent from DOM
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1258: tabs rendered via ternary means the inactive panel DOM node does not exist, making aria-controls point to nothing. Fix: render both panels always and toggle with the hidden attribute or display:none so both IDs are always present for assistive technologies.

suggestions.title: Consolidate three visibilitychange listeners into one
suggestions.description: App.jsx attaches three separate visibilitychange listeners: line 859 (resume+refetch), line 881 (polling interval reset), line 1100 (document title animation). All fire on every tab switch in undefined order. Merge into a single useEffect that handles all three responsibilities atomically.

suggestions.title: Fix four inaccessible clickable elements — spans and divs with onClick but no keyboard semantics
suggestions.description: Four locations have onClick with no keyboard semantics: (1) polling-paused-pill span (line 1196), (2) footer-tagline span (line 1414) NEW, (3) stat-dispatch Active span (line 477), (4) stat-card sync-status div when paused (line 491) NEW. Items 1/2/3 should become button elements. Item 4 should add role=button, tabIndex=0, and onKeyDown for Enter/Space — matching the adjacent Stuck card at line 506 which already does this correctly.

suggestions.title: Fix sparkleUnseen — state never updates after click
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 721: const [sparkleUnseen] = useState destructs without a setter. Clicking the footer sparkle calls localStorage.setItem but state never updates, so sparkleUnseen stays true and the twinkle animation runs all session. Add setter: const [sparkleUnseen, setSparkleUnseen] = useState and call setSparkleUnseen(false) in onClick.

suggestions.title: Fix mobile speech bubble overlapping Office tab toggle
suggestions.description: Confirmed in mobile screenshot at 375px: speech bubble renders upward and covers the Office tab button. Bubble uses position:absolute; bottom:calc(100% + 8px). Fix with mobile media query: @media (max-width: 480px) { .speech-bubble { bottom: auto; top: calc(100% + 4px); } } to push it downward under the character instead.

suggestions.title: Extract completionToast inline style block to CSS class
suggestions.description: App.jsx lines 1149-1166: 14 of 16 style properties are static (position, transform, background, borderRadius, padding, fontSize, fontWeight, color, zIndex, whiteSpace, pointerEvents, animation). Move to .completion-toast in App.css. Expose only dynamic border and boxShadow via CSS custom properties --toast-border-color and --toast-glow-color.

suggestions.title: Move window.matchMedia out of JSX render
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1201: window.matchMedia pointer coarse .matches called inline in JSX on every render. Forces layout query per cycle and throws in SSR. Move to a useRef initialized once, or a useEffect with matchMedia.addEventListener to reactively track pointer type.

suggestions.title: Remove duplicate single-quote vibe selectors in Office.css
suggestions.description: Office.css lines 91-95 define vibe selectors with single-quoted attribute values. Lines 97+ redefine the same selectors with double quotes and additional properties. The single-quote versions are overridden and dead weight. Delete lines 91-95 entirely.

suggestions.title: Add H2 headings to sections and aria-label to tab-error-badge
suggestions.description: Two fixes: (1) Active Workers (line 1267) and Activity Log (line 1333) use div.section-title; replace with h2 for proper document outline. (2) tab-error-badge span at line 1254 reads as a bare number to screen readers; add aria-label with errorCount plus the word errors.

suggestions.title: Memoize filtered activity log — computed twice per render
suggestions.description: Identical activity log filter logic runs twice per Dashboard render: IIFE count label (lines 1335-1350) and ActivityLog entries prop (lines 1394-1403). Extract to a single useMemo keyed on activityLog, activityFilter, workerFilter and reference it in both places.

suggestions.title: Consolidate three getRelativeTime implementations into src/utils/time.js
suggestions.description: App.jsx has canonical getRelativeTime at line 55. Office.jsx has two IIFEs at lines 748 and 969 that have already drifted — ghost bubble version returns just now for under 1 min while huddle version omits that case. Move to src/utils/time.js and import everywhere.

suggestions.title: Memoize handleTabKeyDown with useCallback
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 760: handleTabKeyDown is a plain arrow function recreated every render, passed to two role=tab buttons that are otherwise memo-wrapped. Wrap with useCallback.

suggestions.title: Reduce StatsBar triple workers.filter to single reduce pass
suggestions.description: StatsBar lines 447-449 iterates workers three times for active, idle, errorCount. Replace with a single useMemo reduce pass accumulating all three counts in one iteration.

suggestions.title: Extract SOLO_SPOTLIGHT_MESSAGES IIFE from JSX to helper function
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1292: solo spotlight message computed as a multi-step IIFE with optional chaining, toLowerCase, and two fallback levels inline in JSX. Extract to getSoloMessage(worker, vibeKey) or compute via useMemo. Makes JSX scannable and logic independently testable.

suggestions.title: Move ambient-particle array allocations to module-level constants
suggestions.description: App.jsx line 1124: Array.from with length 12 allocates on every render for static ambient particles. Office.jsx line 1654: spread Array(7) same pattern. Define AMBIENT_PARTICLE_INDICES at module scope in each file. The confetti arrays at lines 1130 and 1137 are fine since they guard transient states.

suggestions.title: Wrap toggleTheme in useCallback and move orphan inline margin to CSS
suggestions.description: Two minor cleanups: (1) toggleTheme at line 758 is a plain arrow function; wrap in useCallback for consistency with surrounding code. (2) section-header at line 1332 has style marginTop 2.5rem as an orphan inline style; move to a CSS modifier class.
